title: Struthiopteris acutiuscula
taxonomy: Struthiopteris acutiuscula is a species of fern that belongs to the family Blechnaceae. It is a type of leathery fern with a distinctive leaf shape. Struthiopteris acutiuscula is native to eastern Australia and is often found growing in moist, shaded areas. The genus Struthiopteris is part of the division Pteridophyta and is characterized by its distinctive leaf morphology. Within the Blechnaceae family, Struthiopteris acutiuscula is closely related to other fern species such as Blechnum and Lorinseria.
